meaning: adj.[医]全身僵硬症的n.全身僵硬症病人
examples: Marshall likened the VP experience to that of a man in a cataleptic fit.
The daughter of a writer, Rufina was mistakenly pronounced dead on her 19th birthday following a cataleptic attack.
D. in neuroscience, bought the same dithering, cataleptic mutual funds as me.
